title: VoidVaults
description: A lightweight modern Folia dual-mode vault with Sorting, Searching, and Quick Deposit. 100% Free and Open Source.
body:
**📦 What is VoidVaults?**

**VoidVaults** is a lightweight (432KB) and high-performance Ender Chest replacement, built from the ground up for modern servers. 🔥

It's built with a 100% asynchronous design, smart caching, and modern code to guarantee zero server lag. Now updated with powerful inventory management tools! 👑

---

**⚙️ Two Modes, One Plugin**

Choose the style that fits your server in the `config.yml`.

![Dual Modes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aJZEs2UA/images/3aedcee9592dae33716f268ec2b00a27051ffe16.png)

**🔵 Mode 1: SIMPLE**
- A clean, simple vault. No buttons, just storage.
- Permissions: `voidvaults.slots.9` up to `voidvaults.slots.54`
- Perfect for: Giving players one big, 54-slot vault as a single reward.

**🟣 Mode 2: PAGED (Default)**
- The full-featured experience with multiple pages.
- **50-Slot Pages:** Sell access to 5 pages (`voidvaults.pages.2`, `voidvaults.pages.5`).
- **Control Bar:** Includes Navigation, Sort, Deposit, and Search buttons.
- **Unlockable Slots:** Use permissions to control how many slots are unlocked per page.

---

**✨ Inventory Management (New in v1.1.0)**

**VoidVaults** now includes built-in tools to help players manage their storage.

![Sorting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aJZEs2UA/images/3a0c96172b7b4ead985004cb25e17d63045cecd0.png)

**📚 Smart Sorting**
- Instantly organizes the current page.
- Groups similar items and sorts them alphabetically.

**📥 Quick Deposit**
- One click to stack matching items from your inventory into the vault.

**🔎 Advanced Search**
- Find items instantly with a dedicated Search GUI or chat input.
- Non-matching items are visually filtered out (grayed out).

![Searching](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aJZEs2UA/images/cbc678efb1e08202e7cf372e20dabba32388fc0d.png)

---

**🔧 Highly Configurable**

Every aspect of the plugin can be tweaked to fit your server's theme.

![Configurable](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/aJZEs2UA/images/eeb3cc6ac269a0039f5a7be41c6c57513c80c376.png)

- **Customizable GUI:** Change every item name, lore, and material.
- **Messages:** Full color support for all chat messages.
- **Toggles:** Disable specific features (like Sorting or Searching) if you don't want them.
- **Storage:** Use lightweight `YAML` or production-ready `MySQL`.

---

**🖥️ Professional Admin Tools**
- `/voidvaults stats`: See real-time performance metrics and cache size.
- `/voidvaults cleancache`: Clean offline players from memory.
- `/voidvaults open <player> [page]`: View and edit any player's vault live.
- `/voidvaults setslots <player> <amount>`: Override a player's slot permissions.

---

**🔗 Links & Support**

**Need help? Want to support the project?**

**💻 Source Code:** [GitHub](https://github.com/mattbaconz/VoidVaults)
**📊 Metrics:** [bStats](https://bstats.org/plugin/bukkit/VoidVaults/28100)
**💬 Support:** [Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/VQjTVKjs46)
**☕ Donate:** [PayPal](https://www.paypal.com/paypalme/MatthewWatuna)

---

**🧩 Dependencies (Optional)**
- **Vault API:** Required for economy integration (fees).
- **PlaceholderAPI:** Required for placeholder support.

---

**🎮 Compatibility**
- **Version:** 1.21+
- **Compatibility:** Paper, Purpur, Folia, and Spigot
